chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI. C.P. No.S-1477 of 2024. Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.11246/2024. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For order on Misc. No.11247/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.12.2024. Mr. Shahid Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. Petitioner Mst. Asma d/o. Imdad Soomro is present before this Court and states that she has contracted the marriage of her own freewill and volition with her husband Naseem s/o. Ghulam Nabi, who is also present in Court, and has not been abducted and she is happily living with her husband. Affidavit of freewill and Nikahnama are available at pages-11 to 13 of the File. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that on account of this unceremonious marriage the respondents No.6 to 10 are annoyed and extending life threats to the petitioner. No FIR has yet been lodged. SHO PS Sobhodero, Khairpur is directed to provide protection to the petitioner and her husband Naseem s/o Ghulam Nabi. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP Khairpur for compliance. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE MAK/PS
